description: Unique identifier for the equipment (BA Number, VEH BA NO, BA NO)
Human-readable name or model of the asset (MAKE & TYPE, MAKE TYPE)
Date when the equipment was first put into service (DATE OF REL, DT OF COMM)
Current total distance traveled by the equipment in kilometers (KM RUN, KM RUN TOTAL)
Distance traveled while towing in kilometers (KM TOW, TOWING KM)
Distance traveled in the previous calendar month (KM RUN PREVIOUS MONTH, PREV MONTH KM)
Distance traveled in the current calendar month (KM RUN CURRENT MONTH, CURR MONTH KM)
Current total operating hours of the equipment (HRS RUN, HR RUN, HOURS RUN)
Fuel consumption rate in km per litre or litres per hour
Serial number or chassis number of the equipment
Category or department the asset belongs to (from sheet name or group column)
Date when TM-I (Technical Maintenance I) was last performed (TM - I DONE, TM-I DONE)
Date when TM-I (Technical Maintenance I) is due (TM - I DUE, TM-I DUE)
Date when TM-II (Technical Maintenance II) was last performed (TM - II DONE, TM-II DONE)
Date when TM-II (Technical Maintenance II) is due (TM - II DUE, TM-II DUE)
Date when Overhaul I was completed (OH-I DONE, OH-I Done, BOH DONE)
Date when Overhaul I is due (OH-I DUE, OH-I Due, BOH DUE)
Date when Overhaul II was completed (OH-II DONE, OH-II Done)
Date when Overhaul II is due (OH-II DUE, OH-II Due)
Service life in years since commissioning (VINTAGE YEARS, LIFE VINTAGE)
Years limit for asset discard (DISCARD CRITERIA VINTAGE YEARS)
Kilometer limit for asset discard (DISCARD CRITERIA METERAGE KMS)
Fluid capacity in litres or kg (CAPACITY LTRS/KG, CAPACITY, LTR)
Additional 10% top-up quantity for fluid (ADDL 10% TOP UP, TOP UP)
Grade or specification of fluid (GRADE, FLUID GRADE, OIL GRADE)
Date of last fluid change (DT OF CHANGE, LAST CHANGE, DATE CHANGE)
Service interval or periodicity for fluid change (PERIODICITY, INTERVAL)
Date of last battery change (BTY DT OF CHANGE, BATTERY CHANGE DATE)
Battery life in months or years (BTY LIFE, BATTERY LIFE)
Tyre rotation information or mileage
Tyre condition status or rating
Tyre mileage or distance covered on tyres
Serial number row identifier to be ignored (SER NO, SNO, SERIAL NO)
Remarks or notes column to be ignored (REMARKS, NOTES, COMMENTS)
Engine oil fluid type - ENG OIL, ENGINE OIL, CRANKCASE OIL
Transmission oil fluid type - TXN OIL, TRANS OIL, GEAR OIL
Hydraulic oil fluid type - HYD OIL, HYD OIL 570, HYDRAULIC
Coolant fluid type - COOLANT, RAD COOLANT, RADIATOR FLUID
Grease fluid type - GREASE, LUBRICANT GREASE
Differential oil fluid type - DIFFERENTIAL, DIFF OIL
Hub oil fluid type - HUB OIL, WHEEL HUB OIL
Clutch oil fluid type - CLUTCH, CLUTCH OIL
Steering oil fluid type - STEERING OIL, POWER STEERING
Brake clutch oil fluid type - BRAKE CLUTCH, BRAKE OIL
Front axle oil fluid type - FRONT AXLE, FRONT AXLE OIL
Gear box oil fluid type - GEAR BOX, GEAR OIL BOX, GEARBOX
Transmission system oil - TRANSMISSION SYS, TRANS SYS
Hydraulic oil for heavy equipment - HYDRAULIC OIL, HYD SYSTEM
